about.heading: Dental care that feels easy to understand
about.body: BrightSmile is a fictional demo for a modern Indian dental clinic. It shows how a strong local website can combine clear text, real-looking images, services, doctors, appointment flow, testimonials and location details without overwhelming the visitor.
about.bodyTwo: For a real clinic, this section should use verified history, actual dentist credentials, real photos, approved reviews and confirmed payment details.

screening.heading: Know your oral health before the clinic visit
screening.text: Use the appointment form to choose a treatment concern, preferred date and preferred time. This demo does not send or store your data.

reviews.quote: The appointment process felt simple, and every step was explained clearly. The website made it easy to understand services before calling.
reviews.author: Demo patient

reviews.quote: A calm, welcoming clinic experience for our entire family. The WhatsApp option helped us ask quick questions before visiting.
reviews.author: Demo family patient

reviews.quote: The dentist profile and FAQ made the clinic feel more trustworthy. Booking a preferred time was straightforward.
reviews.author: Demo working professional

faqs.question: How do I request an appointment?
faqs.answer: Use the form below, choose a date and time, call the clinic, or send a WhatsApp message. This concept demo does not transmit or store form data.

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: Appointments are recommended so the clinic can reserve enough time for your concern. Urgent cases can call before visiting.

faqs.question: Will treatment start during the first visit?
faqs.answer: The first visit normally focuses on understanding your concern and discussing suitable next steps. Treatment depends on the assessment and your consent.

faqs.question: What payment methods are available?
faqs.answer: The concept clinic supports UPI, cards and cash. EMI or insurance support should only be listed after confirming the real clinic's policy.
